step_rationale: Lipoprotein and plaque lipid species; elevated in proatherogenic lipidome.
mechanism: Phosphatidylethanolamine enrichment in atherosclerotic lipoproteins reflects atherogenic lipid remodeling.

references.title: Early life infection and proinflammatory, atherogenic metabolomic and lipidomic profiles in infancy: a population-based cohort study.
Human serum lipidomics analysis revealed glyphosate may lead to lipid metabolism disorders and health risks.
